title: 2 Pack Bread Maker Paddle for Panasonic SD2500 SD2501 SD2510 SD2511 SD256 SD257 SD255 SD-ZB2502, Flat and Rye Kneading Blade Set Teflon Coated Bread Machine Replacement Part Dough Mixer Accessory
features: Perfect Compatibility:Bread maker paddle designed for Panasonic models like SD2500, SD2501, SD2510, SD2511, SD256, SD257, and more. Check model before purchase to ensure a secure and accurate fit.
Flat & Rye Paddle Set: Bread maker paddle for Panasonic includes both flat and rye kneading paddles to mix standard or dense doughs like whole wheat or rye efficiently for consistent baking results.

Durable Teflon-Coated Blades: High-quality, wear-resistant, non-stick coating of the replacement bread maker paddle ensures reliable performance, long-term use, and easy removal of dough without sticking.

Easy Replacement & Use: No tools required. Simply insert the kneading paddle for Panasonic into your bread pan shaft and start kneading immediately. Ideal for replacing damaged or lost original parts.
Secure & Protective Packaging: Each teflon coated bread paddle is carefully packed to avoid damage during delivery. Ready to use right out of the box with no assembly needed.
description: Upgrade your baking performance with our 2 Pack Bread Maker Paddle Set, specially designed for a wide range of Panasonic bread maker models. This set includes one flat paddle and one rye kneading paddle, offering versatility for standard and dense dough recipes like rye or whole wheat. These kneading paddles are compatible with popular Panasonic models including SD2500, SD2501, SD2510, SD2511, SD256, SD257, SD255, SD-ZB2502, SD-ZB2512, and SD-ZX2522. Whether your original paddle is missing or worn out, these replacements ensure a perfect fit and restore optimal kneading performance to your bread machine. Crafted from premium materials with a durable Teflon coating, these paddles are built to withstand frequent use. The non-stick surface ensures smooth mixing and easy cleaning after use. The flat blade handles most bread types, while the rye paddle is designed for thicker doughs, ensuring complete mixing and even rising. Installation is fast and tool-free—just insert the paddle into the shaft and start your bread-making process. This convenience makes the set ideal for both casual home bakers and regular users looking for a reliable replacement. Each paddle is securely packed to prevent damage during transit, so it arrives ready for immediate use. With this bread machine replacement paddle set, you can enjoy fresh, homemade bread with perfect texture and consistency every time. Restore your Panasonic bread maker to its original performance—add this kneading blade set to your baking essentials today. Package Includes: 1 x Teflon Coated Flat 1 x Rye Kneading Paddles
